title: Las Vegas Sands 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary source for company description, property portfolio, regulatory exposure, revenue, net income, and adjusted property EBITDA.

title: Las Vegas Sands Our Properties
note: Describes the Macao and Singapore properties, including The Venetian Macao and Marina Bay Sands facility scale.

title: Las Vegas Sands Our Planet
note: Supports environmental priorities, energy-efficiency, renewable-energy, water, waste, and resort-operations context.

title: Las Vegas Sands Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization and share-price snapshot used for the marketCap input.

title: Las Vegas Sands P/E Ratio
note: Trailing P/E ratio snapshot used for the peRatio input.

title: Marina Bay Sands Official Site
note: Product source for Marina Bay Sands positioning, hotel, dining, retail, attractions, and loyalty experience.

title: The Venetian Macao Official Site
note: Product source for The Venetian Macao hotel, dining, shopping, meetings, entertainment, and offers.

title: QloApps Open Source Hotel Management System
note: Describes QloApps as a free and open-source hotel management system with PMS, booking engine, hotel website, and channel manager.

title: QloApps GitHub Repository
note: Source repository and license context for the open-source QloApps hotel reservation system.

title: About Fairbnb.coop
note: Supports cooperative tourism, local-node governance, community project funding, host rules, and local validation claims.

title: OpenTravel Hospitality
note: Supports the role of open travel retail and hospitality distribution standards in multi-operator destination networks.

title: HotelDruid Hotel Management Software
note: Open-source hotel management software source for independent lodging PMS, booking-page, and channel-management capabilities.

title: OpenEMS Energy Management System
note: Open-source energy management system used as an enabler for distributed resort energy-management concepts.

title: OpenEMS GitHub Repository
note: Source repository for OpenEMS open-source energy management software.

title: OpenADR Alliance
note: Demand-response interoperability source used for open resort energy coordination concepts.
